race.comment: Tough finish. OVER THE EDGE (3) is going okay for this, beaten as a short priced favourite at Penola two back before a solid effort in this grade at Murray Bridge. Doubt this takes any more winning and Crowther on is a positive. WHOOPS A DAISY (13) presents third up off a little mid-prep trial. She was okay last time in a stronger race when in the market and could take catching from the inside gate. ROYAL TRAPEZE (8) also drops in grade off a poor showing last time. The run prior reads well for this but he does have a sticky map. PRODIGAL LAD (4) resumes. He's off a short break and draws well, could give some cheek. MONDELLO (9) resumes for the Jolly yard with pieces of form that go close in this.
